title: verbascum limnense
intro: Verbascum limnense, also known as Limestone Mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family that is native to Greece and the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum limnense include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
